name: create_sql_view_with_association
description: Skill 3: Create a SQL View (SV_) that INNER JOINs Billing Document Item (VR1_BILLING_DOC_ITEM_TD_001) and Billing Document Header (VR1_BILLING_DOC_TD_001) on BillingDocument, and defines a cds.Association on CompanyCode linking to SV_COMPANYCODE master data. Returns a CSN dry-run by default. Set deploy=true to create in Datasphere.

view_name.description: Technical name for the SQL view (must start with SV_).

join_field.description: Column used for the INNER JOIN between the two tables.

association_field.description: Column used as the cds.Association key (many-to-one).

master_data_view.description: Association target view (SV_ or GV_ view).

deploy.description: Set true to deploy after dry-run review. Requires confirm and acknowledge_ai.

confirm.description: Human confirmation flag. Must be true when deploy=true.

acknowledge_ai.description: AI literacy acknowledgement. Must be true when deploy=true.
